name: Target 1 - Relationship Coach
relevance: Works with busy professionals on building better daily connection habits with partners and teams. Uses prompts and rituals in her programs.

name: Target 2 - Product Ops Lead
relevance: Focused on habit formation and retention. Runs experiments on small thoughtful touches that improve user and team stickiness.

name: Target 3 - Community Builder
relevance: Builds engaged audiences and wants better tools to turn one-off engagement into consistent, meaningful relationships.
